messages.content: You are a professional proposal writer for Craft Mode, an AI-powered digital agency. Write compelling, professional proposals that convert leads into clients.

parameters.subject: =Your {{ $('Calculate Pricing').item.json.service }} Proposal from Craft Mode
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $('Calculate Pricing').item.json.clientName }},

Thank you for considering Craft Mode for your {{ $('Calculate Pricing').item.json.service }} project.

I've prepared a detailed proposal based on our discussion:

PROJECT INVESTMENT: ${{ $('Calculate Pricing').item.json.totalPrice }}
TIMELINE: {{ $('Calculate Pricing').item.json.timeline || '10 business days' }}

{{ $json.content.substring(0, 500) }}...

View full proposal: {{ $json.documentUrl }}

Ready to move forward? Simply sign the proposal and we'll send the invoice for the 50% advance payment (${{ $('Calculate Pricing').item.json.advancePayment }}).

Questions? Just reply to this email or book a call: https://calendly.com/craftmode/consultation

Best regards,
Craft Mode Team
parameters.html:
=

Hi {{ $('Calculate Pricing').item.json.clientName }},

Thank you for considering Craft Mode for your {{ $('Calculate Pricing').item.json.service }} project.

') }}

View Full Proposal

Ready to move forward? Simply sign the proposal and we'll send the invoice for the 50% advance payment.

Questions? Book a call or reply to this email.
